message:
test(property): add trace ID and WebSocket frame property tests (bd-m46d)

Add 49 property tests across two new test files:
- property_trace_ids: TraceId/SymbolSpanId u128 round-trip, W3C format
  compliance, nil detection, deterministic RNG generation
- property_ws_frame: XOR mask involution, client/server encode/decode
  round-trips, payload length encoding boundaries, control frame
  constraints, opcode parsing, close code sendability, sequential
  frame ordering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
